---
title: "Your Title"
subtitle: "Your Subtitle"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  spellbind::rladies_pdf:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(spellbind)
```

## Introduction

Start writing your document here.

## Plot Example

```{r plot-example}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) +
  geom_point(colour = rladies_cols("purple"), size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Weight vs Fuel Efficiency",
    x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
    y = "Miles per Gallon"
  ) +
  theme_rladies()
```

## Summary

Your summary here.
